name: Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the yogurt and milk to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
3. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites until no lumps remain.
4. Heat a non-stick griddle or pan over medium heat. If using a regular pan, lightly spray with shortening spray.
5. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges look set (about 2-3 minutes).
7. Flip the pancakes and cook the other side until golden brown (about 1-2 minutes more).
8. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
